name: PATCH /api/v1/account/user/update/ - invalid token returns 401 not_authenticated
description:
Purpose: Verify that invalid Bearer token returns 401
        Doc error: 401 not_authenticated
descriptionHtml:
Purpose: Verify that invalid Bearer token returns 401
    Doc error: 401 not_authenticated
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected 'not_authenticated' message_key, Got: {'message': 'Token is invalid or expired', 'message_key': 'token_not_valid', 'errors': {'detail': 'Given token not valid for any token type', 'code': 'token_not_valid', 'messages': "{'token_class': ErrorDetail(string='AccessToken', code='token_not_valid'), 'token_type': ErrorDetail(string='access', code='token_not_valid'), 'message': ErrorDetail(string='Token is invalid', code='token_not_valid')}"}, 'exception_class': 'InvalidToken'}
assert ('token_not_valid' == 'not_authenticated'
  
  - not_authenticated
  + token_not_valid or 'not_authenticated' in '')
 +  where '' = str('')
 +    where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7f1d6d927440>('detail', '')
 +      where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7f1d6d927440> = {'errors': {'code': 'token_not_valid', 'detail': 'Given token not valid for any token type', 'messages': "{'token_class': ErrorDetail(string='AccessToken', code='token_not_valid'), 'token_type': ErrorDetail(string='access', code='token_not_valid'), 'message': ErrorDetail(string='Token is invalid', code='token_not_valid')}"}, 'exception_class': 'InvalidToken', 'message': 'Token is invalid or expired', 'message_key': 'token_not_valid'}.get
statusTrace:
